---
title: "Team"
description: "Instructors and guest lecturers for Maker-X Summer 2026"
---

<span class="sl" style="color:#FCD34D">// INSTRUCTORS &nbsp;·&nbsp; 教师团队</span>

## Meet your team · 认识你的团队

A joint offering of **Kedao College**, **SCA** (School of Creativity and Art), **SIST** (School of Information Science and Technology), and **SEM** (School of Entrepreneurship and Management) at ShanghaiTech University.

---

### Instructors

```{=html}
<div class="instructor-card">
  <div class="avatar av-blue">S</div>
  <div>
    <div class="inst-name">Shimon Shmueli</div>
    <div class="inst-role">Instructor &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="inst-tag tag-sca">SCA</span></div>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem; color:#9AACBF; margin:0.5rem 0 0.4rem;">
      Interdisciplinary educator and practitioner at the intersection of technology, design, and creativity.
      Leads the Maker-X course design and overall program direction.
    </p>
    <a href="mailto:sshmueli@shanghaitech.edu.cn" style="font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif; font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-decoration:none; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:3px 10px; border-radius:20px;">
      ✉ Email
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="instructor-card">
  <div class="avatar av-purple">D</div>
  <div>
    <div class="inst-name">Daniel Koo</div>
    <div class="inst-role">Instructor &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="inst-tag tag-sca">SCA</span></div>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem; color:#9AACBF; margin:0.5rem 0 0;">
      Designer and educator at SCA, bringing expertise in creative processes, form development,
      and human-centered design to the course.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="instructor-card">
  <div class="avatar av-teal">梁</div>
  <div>
    <div class="inst-name">梁俊睿</div>
    <div class="inst-role">Instructor &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="inst-tag tag-sist">SIST</span></div>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem; color:#9AACBF; margin:0.5rem 0 0;">
      Faculty at SIST bringing technical depth in embedded systems, AI, and hardware integration —
      the engineering backbone of the course.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="instructor-card">
  <div class="avatar" style="background:rgba(52,211,153,0.18); color:#34D399; font-size:1rem;">周</div>
  <div>
    <div class="inst-name">Xiaoyu Zhou &nbsp;<span style="font-weight:400; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">周晓宇</span></div>
    <div class="inst-role">Instructor &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="inst-tag" style="background:rgba(52,211,153,0.15); color:#34D399;">SEM</span></div>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem; color:#9AACBF; margin:0.5rem 0 0.5rem;">
      Associate Professor &amp; Assistant Dean at the <a href="https://sem.shanghaitech.edu.cn/sem_en/main.htm" target="_blank">School of Entrepreneurship and Management</a>, ShanghaiTech.
      PhD in Business Administration from Peking University. Brings entrepreneurship, pitching strategy, and startup ecosystem expertise to the course.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### Guest Lecturers

<span class="sl" style="color:#A78BFA">// GUEST LECTURES &nbsp;·&nbsp; 特邀讲座</span>

```{=html}
<div class="instructor-card">
  <div class="avatar av-purple" style="font-size:1rem;">史</div>
  <div>
    <div class="inst-name">JunJun Shi &nbsp;<span style="font-weight:400; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">史珺珺</span></div>
    <div class="inst-role">Guest Lecture — Week 1</div>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem; color:#9AACBF; margin:0.5rem 0 0.5rem;">
      <em>"Empathy as the starting point for designing robot personality"</em> — how human insight
      shapes the soul of a machine. A lecture and workshop that bridges design thinking and character design
      in the context of AI-powered physical products.
    </p>
    <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);">Topics: Empathy mapping · Character archetypes · Personality-first design · Robot affect</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="instructor-card">
  <div class="avatar av-blue" style="font-size:0.75rem; letter-spacing:-0.02em;">ESP</div>
  <div>
    <div class="inst-name">Espressif Engineers</div>
    <div class="inst-role">Guest Lecture — Week 2</div>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem; color:#9AACBF; margin:0.5rem 0 0.5rem;">
      Engineers from <a href="https://www.espressif.com" target="_blank">Espressif Systems</a> — the company behind the ESP32 — give a deep dive
      into the hardware platform and the <a href="https://esp-claw.com/en/" target="_blank">ESP-Claw framework</a>,
      straight from the people who built it.
    </p>
    <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);">Topics: ESP32 architecture · Wi-Fi & Bluetooth · ESP-Claw internals · AI integration patterns</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Contact

For course enquiries or collaboration:

| | |
|---|---|
| **Shimon Shmueli** | [sshmueli@shanghaitech.edu.cn](mailto:sshmueli@shanghaitech.edu.cn) |
